purpose: Define the fixed ordered workflow an agent must follow when entering an independent service through ai-governance before solution work begins.

ordered_stages.gate_rule: the handbook must be acknowledged before any service-local review starts
repo-wide scan may start only after link auth is valid
repository scan must remain read-first and boundary-aware
normalization review must classify canonical and drifted surfaces before planning
diet review must classify retain, archive, and delete-review candidates before cleanup
frontend platform, backend platform, domain owner, api boundary, domain routing mode, and rollback entrypoint must be declared before apply planning
apply remains blocked until the plan is approved and the scope is trace-linked

rules: The intake workflow is ordered and may not skip handbook acknowledgement.
Repository-wide scans are allowed, but mutating actions remain gated.
Deployment topology must be declared against the deployment operations contract before solution apply planning.
Frontend cutover, domain routing, and rollback entrypoints must be reviewable before production-bound apply planning.
Every intake stage must emit a trace-linked packet or receipt.
